title: 500 Error Handling for Metrics Analysis Server
description: Address 500 error handling for the first Metrics Analysis server. The issue was believed to have been fixed previously and was confirmed as resolved.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics Analysis server does not return unhandled 500 errors
Errors are caught and presented gracefully to the user
middleware_changes: Error handling for 500 responses from the Metrics Analysis server.
api_changes: Graceful error handling for Metrics Analysis API 500 errors.
implementation_notes: Issue was pre-existing and believed to be already fixed at ticket creation time. Confirmed resolved.
comment_summary: Developer requested more description. Later confirmed the issue was already fixed and asked for confirmation if the issue still persisted.
